titleStmt.title: SII 28.284: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 284. (A.R. No. 438 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kāmēśvara temple, second prākāra, south wall.

This inscription records a (royal) order addressed to the tānattār of the temple of Tirukkāmīśvaramuḍaiya-nāyaṉār, the God of Āṟagaḷūr in Āṟṟūrkūṟṟam, directing that the weavers settled by them outside the northern gate of Āṟagaḷūr may be assigned as the cultivators (kuḍi-makkaḷ) of the dēvadāna (lands) of God Kulaśēkhara-āḷuḍaiyār consecreted by Ka[ṇ]ḍiya-dēvar in their temple with effect from the date cited. The order was attested by Ādi[tta]ṉ Gaṇapatiyāḻvāṉ alias Kāḍuveṭṭi of Kappalūr alias Ulagaḷanta-chōḻanallūr of (cf. 275).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Aruḷic ceyal Āṟṟūrk kūṟṟattu Āṟākaḷur Uṭaiyār tirukāmiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilt tāṉattārkku
Āṟakaḷur vaṭakku vācalukkup puṟampu tāṅkaḷ ḷuvitta tantuvāyak kuṭimakkaḷai pattāvatu Āṉi mātam Ikkoyilil kka
ṇṭiya tevar Eḻuntaruvitta kulacekara Āḷuṭaiyaārkku tevatāṉak kuṭimakkaḷākat tantom Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭipā
ṭākak koṇṭu tevatāṉak kuṭimakkaḷāka cantirātittavaṟ celvatākak kallilum cempilum veṭṭik kaṭamai pokak
ppittuk koḷka Ippaṭikku Ivai pāṇṭi maṇṭalattu muttūrk kūṟṟattuk kappalūrāṉ Ulakaḷanta coḻanallūr Ātit
ṉ kaṇapatiyāḻvāṉāṉa kāṭuveṭṭi Eḻuttu tiruveḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 28.284 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
